entities.name: Abaa

attributes.role: king of the spirits of the air of Mercury
attributes.alignment: neither fully for good nor fully evil

entities.raw_quote: king of the spirits of the air of Mercury, governing between the West and North... said to be neither fully for good nor fully evil.

entities.name: Anael

attributes.sigil_connection: Name found on the Seal of God

entities.raw_quote: prince of angels associated with the planet Venus and the southwest. The name of this angel is found on the Seal of God.

entities.name: Asmodeus

attributes.role: terrestrial spirit, assistant of prince Labadau
attributes.description: best well known of all spirits listed by Honorius

entities.raw_quote: terrestrial spirit, assistant of prince Labadau. This demon is the best well known of all spirits listed by Honorius.

entities.name: Barthan

attributes.direction: north winds, ruling in the East

entities.raw_quote: king of daemons associated with the Sun and the north winds; ruling in the East.

entities.name: Gabriel

attributes.sigil_connection: Name found on the Seal of God

entities.raw_quote: planetary spirit associated with the Moon; name of one of four archangel... Name of this angel is found on the Seal of God.

summary: This chunk contains bibliographic references and an index of spirit names from the Liber Juratus Honorii, detailing attributes like planetary associations, hierarchies, and moral alignments. It lists specific entities such as Abaa, Anael, and Asmodeus along with their roles within the magical cosmology described in the text.
key_passages: king of the spirits of the air of Mercury, governing between the West and North
prince of angels associated with the planet Venus and the southwest. The name of this angel is found on the Seal of God.
This demon is the best well known of all spirits listed by Honorius, including from the Book of Tobit and the Testament of Solomon.
king of daemons associated with the Sun and the north winds; ruling in the East
